2376000.name: Angels vs Angels
2376000.description:
Angels vs Angels

A fast-paced multiplayer action shooter where angels battle angels using divine weapons in surreal, symbolic arenas.

Angels vs Angels is a competitive PvP game focused on quick matches, skill-based combat, and chaotic celestial warfare. Players take control of powerful angels, each armed with unique weapons and abilities, and fight across abstract environments inspired by sacred architecture and religious symbolism.

The game emphasizes immediate action, readable combat, and short match sessions — jump in, fight, and improve your skills without long waiting times.

Key Features

  • ⚔️ Fast-paced multiplayer combat
    Short, intense matches designed for instant action and replayability.

  • 👼 Playable angel characters
    Different weapons, abilities, and movement styles to support multiple playstyles.

  • 🏛 Stylized celestial arenas
    Battle inside churches, heavens, and abstract symbolic locations.

  • 🤖 Bots & AI support
    Play even when online matches are quiet — no empty servers.

  • 🔄 Active development
    New maps, balance updates, and gameplay improvements planned.

Early Access

Angels vs Angels is currently in Early Access. The game is actively evolving, and player feedback directly influences future updates. Expect changes, improvements, and new content over time.

英语*
